What Customers Love

Highlights from our customer feedback

💬

Customers appreciate the time taken to explain medications clearly.

💬

Friendly and welcoming staff make the experience comfortable.

💬

Convenient location with medications and everyday essentials available.

💬

Knowledgeable pharmacist who truly cares about customer health.

💬

Professional and accurate prescription service.

Trusted Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Real reviews from real customers who trust Lewis Drug Mart.

★★★★★

"The staff here is incredibly friendly and knowledgeable. They took time to explain how to use my new medication and answered all my questions."

Margaret Chen

Regular Customer

★★★★★

"I've been using Lewis Drug Mart for over five years. The pharmacist really knows me and my health needs. I trust their service completely."

David Alleyne

Community Member

★★★★★

"Convenient location, fair prices, and excellent customer service. This is the pharmacy I recommend to all my friends and family."

Yvonne Thompson

Local Resident

★★★★

"My prescriptions are always filled accurately and promptly. The team's attention to detail gives me confidence in my medication care."

James Williams

Prescription Customer

★★★★★

"Love the welcoming atmosphere here. They go above and beyond to help, and they truly care about their customers' health and wellness."

Simone Grant

Community Supporter

Had a Great Experience?

We'd love to hear about your visit to Lewis Drug Mart. Your feedback helps us serve you better and guides other community members.
